note: Aave-v3 fork with different addresses/governance — tests the generic registry path, not Aave-specific hardcoded addresses
Curve stableswap pool — a totally different registry/token idiom (coins() indexed getters, no Aave-style provider)
Balancer V2 singleton Vault — pools are registered inside one contract, non-Aave architecture
Compound V3 (Comet) cUSDCv3 — per-market Comet contract, different from Aave reserves
